comment.body:
No, that’s not what she said. Reversion trade, guys.
If you actually read what she wrote, she predicted vol suppression, which means there’s no intraday edge. On the long side, you can’t profit from 0DTEs without volatility.
However, she did say that by Thursday, volatility could pick up a bit, which would favor reversion trading. But it’s not a guarantee..that’s why she keeps saying read the tape  day by day

comment.body:
Reversion trade just means a long intraday trade..it doesn’t mean the market will drop, just that there will be volatility. And volatility works in both directions.
I’m guessing once she gets the positioning data tomorrow, we’ll get a clearer picture of where reversion setups might be worth taking.
